title: AgentOS v0 — Definitive Plan
summary: Canonical post-convergence v0 build plan and technical contract for the AgentOS Intent Runtime: security invariants, broker/executor API shape, repo layout, and build order.
notes: Type set from authoritative MANIFEST_TYPE=SPEC; content also reads as a build spec (API shape contract, repo layout, invariants, acceptance test) so manifest aligns with signals. Embedded 'PLAN.md wins on conflict' line treated as document content, not instruction. cross_refs point under archive/ which is intentionally excluded from this ingest.
